Identifier.Label: Document Identifier
Identifier.Hint: Item & Activity identifiers must be modified on the respective document sheet.

Source.Label: Automation Source
Source.Hint: Pick which module provides the automation for this document.
Source.HintNone: No automation sources have registered an automation for this document.

Version.Label: Automation Version
Version.Hint: Reported by the selected automation source.

IgnoreItem.Label: Ignore Item
IgnoreItem.Hint: Skip this item during mass apply / update operations.

EmbeddedMacros.Title: Embedded Macros: {name}
EmbeddedMacros.None: No embedded macros on this document.

Unavailable.Heading: No automation registered
Unavailable.Copy: No source provides automation for this item.

Footer.SaveTooltip: Commit pending changes; keep the window open.
Footer.DiscardPrompt: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and close?

RulesToggle.NotApplicable: Rules selection not applicable for this document.

Configuration.None: No configurable options for this automation.

behavior.Label: Behavior
behavior.Tooltip: How the automation triggers and what it applies.

tuning.Label: Tuning
tuning.Tooltip: Numeric and selection tuning for the automation.

visuals.Label: Visuals
visuals.Tooltip: Icons, images, and other visual hooks.

Documents.Placeholder: Paste UUID or drag a document here
Documents.InvalidUuid: No document found for that UUID.

Macros.None: No macros registered for this document.

DisplayDebugLogs.Name: Display Debug Logs
DisplayDebugLogs.Hint: When enabled, the console will show debug logs.

HideNames.Name: Hide Token Names
HideNames.Hint: Whene enabled, various dialogs will not show enemy token names.

DiceSoNice.Name: Dice So Nice Compatibility
DiceSoNice.Hint: When enabled, Dice So Nice damage roll animations will be delayed until after all damage roll macros are complete.

EffectDescriptions.Name: Automatic Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptions.Hint: When enabled, effects without descriptions will automatically be filled in from the origin item.

EffectDescriptionsNPC.Name: Hide NPC Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptionsNPC.Hint: When enabled, the Automatic Effect Description setting will not apply for NPC created effects.

CV.Name: {condition} Condition Vulnerability
CV.Description: Condition Vulnerability to {condition}, roll at disadvantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).

CR.Name: {condition} Condition Resistance
CR.Description: Condition Resistance to {condition}, roll at advantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).
